headline: DA Davidson Maintains Buy on Citizens Financial Group, Raises Price Target to $74
summary: DA Davidson  analyst Peter Winter   maintains Citizens Financial Group (NYSE:CFG) with a Buy and raises the price target from $73 to $74.

headline: Is Citizens Financial Group (CFG) Still Attractively Priced After A 94% One Year Surge?
summary: If you are wondering whether Citizens Financial Group at around US$64.45 still offers value after a strong run, the next sections will walk through what the current price might be implying. The stock shows a 93.7% return over 1 year and 157.8% over 3 years. The 30 day return of 13.0% and a small 7 day decline of 0.5% suggest sentiment has shifted quickly at the margin. Recent news coverage around Citizens Financial Group has focused on its position within the US banking sector and how...
